summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Price Editing and Promotions CRUD features completed successfully. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI interactions work correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin/pnice2024 - 200 OK
Admin token verification - valid token accepted, invalid rejected
PATCH /api/admin/products/{id}/price - quick price update works (single and multiple fields)
PATCH returns 400 when no price fields provided
Unauthorized requests correctly return 401
GET /api/admin/promotions - returns all 4 default promotions (WELCOME10, SAVE15, FIRST20, FLAT10)
Promotion structure validation - has required fields (code, discount_type, discount_value, active)
POST /api/admin/promotions - creates new percentage and fixed promotions
Duplicate promotion code correctly rejected with 400
PUT /api/admin/promotions/{code} - updates promotion values, verified persistence
Update nonexistent promotion returns 404
PATCH /api/admin/promotions/{code}/toggle - toggles active status correctly
Toggle nonexistent promotion returns 404
DELETE /api/admin/promotions/{code} - deletes promotion, verified removal
Delete nonexistent promotion returns 404
Products table shows all 5 products with Price, Compare At, Subscribe columns
Green $ button enables inline price editing (3 input fields appear)
Save button (checkmark) updates price via PATCH and closes editing mode
Cancel button (X) reverts changes without saving
Promotions tab shows stats cards (Total Promotions, Active, Total Uses)
Promotions tab displays all 4 pre-existing promotions
New Promotion button opens creation form modal
Creating promotion with code, type, value, min order works
Toggle promotion Active/Inactive status works (clickable status badge)
Edit button opens form pre-filled, code field disabled
Delete promotion with confirm dialog works
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test promotions (TEST_*, FIXED_*, UPDT_*, TOGL_*, DEL_*, TESTUI25) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin price editing and promotions CRUD features fully tested. Products tab has inline price editing with 3 fields (price, compare_at_price, subscription_price). Promotions tab has full CRUD with stats cards. All data-testid attributes in place for test automation.
note_on_data_persistence: Products and Promotions data is stored in-memory (PRODUCTS dict and DISCOUNT_CODES dict) - not MongoDB. This is by design per main agent's note. Price changes also update MongoDB for products.
